==Biography==
===2016 Season===
In October 2015, Legacy Genesis left the [[Legacy Esports|Legacy]] organization and became [[Trident Esports]]. However, Claire was [[List of Competitive Rulings|banned]] from competitive play for the duration of the [[OPL/2016 Season/Split 1|OPL Split 1]]. He left the team in April.

== Trivia ==
* Highest ranking on NA in Season 3 was Diamond 1, 30LP.
* Peaked at rank 1 on OCE in Season 3 and 5. Achieved top 5 in Season 4.
